ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the order is being shipped to */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the order is being shipped to */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address the order is being shipped to */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company agent handling the order */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company shipping the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order is being shipped */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the order */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer who placed the order */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES order_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the city belongs to */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province the city belongs to */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the address belongs to */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the address */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the company agent */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the agent works for */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the order */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the shipping company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shipping company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping company used */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES shipping_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being updated */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status of the shipment */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_updates_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_updates_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES shipment_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role (e.g., view orders, edit orders) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
